source_registry.name: Gemeinde Asten
source_registry.notes: RiS-Kommunal. Paginated rasterList with title/date/time/venue/address/organizer. index.php?id=8 returns 403 to non-browsers.

source_registry.name: Stadtgemeinde Enns (erlebe.enns.at)
source_registry.notes: Calendar is a React SPA (snooop); /events renders empty and API needs auth. BUT /sitemap-events.xml lists all event URLs and each detail page embeds server-rendered JSON (title, address, startDate, openingHours). Crawl via sitemap.

source_registry.name: Marktgemeinde St. Florian
source_registry.notes: JS-only SPA, unfetchable statically. Fallback: tips.at Bezirksrundschau Linz-Land covers St. Florian events.

source_registry.name: Stadtgemeinde Ansfelden
source_registry.notes: TYPO3 month grid. Direct fetch has TLS chain issue; readable via reader proxy. Mostly recurring Otelo community meetups.

source_registry.name: Stadtgemeinde Traun
source_registry.notes: RiS-Kommunal. Friendly URL /Veranstaltungskalender is a JS shell — use the raw aspx listing, full data there.

source_registry.name: Marktgemeinde Pucking
source_registry.notes: RiS-Kommunal. Use the Aktuelles subpage, not /Veranstaltungskalender. Events also in GEM2GO app + newsletter.

source_registry.name: Gemeinde St. Marien
source_registry.notes: Lowercase /veranstaltungen.html works; capitalized path 404s. Old ooe.gv.at domain has cert errors.

source_registry.name: Gemeinde Luftenberg
source_registry.notes: RiS-Kommunal, many club events. Yearly PDF calendar also exists under /Veranstaltungskalender_<Jahr>_PDF.

source_registry.name: Gemeinde Niederneukirchen
source_registry.notes: GEM2GO/RiS list, paginated (~6 pages), DD.MM.YYYY dates, times often blank.

source_registry.name: Gemeinde Hargelsberg
source_registry.notes: GEM2GO list with title/date/time range/location; some recurring weekly entries.
